title: UHSR Rohtak Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: UHSR Rohtak Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences Result 2026 has officially been released for B.Sc Medical Technology Operation Theatre (O.T.) 2nd and 3rd Year annual exams conducted in December 2025. Students can now check and download their results online through the official UHSR Rohtak website at uhsr.ac.in.

content.text: UHSR Rohtak Result 2026 has been officially released for B.Sc Medical Technology Operation Theatre (O.T.) 2nd and 3rd Year annual examination conducted in December 2025. Students who appeared for these UG medical technology exams can now check their results online through the official portal.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://uhsr.ac.in/. The university has published results for various UG courses, including B.Sc Medical Technology programs. Students can access their results by visiting the official website and downloading the result PDF using their roll number or checking their names in the gazette.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result PDF, such as name, roll number, and marks obtained. In case of any discrepancy, they should immediately contact the university authorities for correction.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences has released the latest UG medical course results for the December 2025 annual exams. Students can now access the B.Sc Medical Technology O.T. 2nd and 3rd Year results online through the official website. The result is available in gazette format for easy download and verification.

rows: Pt. Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences, Rohtak

content.text: UHSR Rohtak has activated the direct link to check the B.Sc Medical Technology O.T. 2nd and 3rd Year results for the 2026 session. Students can quickly access and download their results in PDF format from the official website using the link provided below.

links.label: B.Sc Medical Technology O.T. 2nd & 3rd Year Result Dec 2025

sections.heading: How to Download UHSR Rohtak Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check and download the UHSR Rohtak Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official website of UHSR Rohtak - https://uhsr.ac.in/
Click on the "Results" section available on the homepage.
Find and click on the relevant result link for B.Sc Medical Technology O.T. 2nd and 3rd Year.
The result PDF will open on the screen.
Search your roll number or name in the PDF.
Download and save the result for future reference.

structured_links.label: B.Sc Medical Technology O.T. 2nd & 3rd Year Result Dec 2025
